summary: The CI job failed because a `wget` command inside a Docker build step received an HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error when trying to download a Nydus binary from GitHub. This is a transient network failure that caused the `buildx bake` process to exit with code 1.
root_cause: A transient HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error was returned by GitHub when the Docker build attempted to download the Nydus release tarball via wget, causing the build step to fail.

evidence.quote: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: This is the direct error from wget indicating a transient network/proxy failure when reaching the GitHub download URL.

evidence.quote: ERROR: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: This confirms the wget command failed with exit code 1, propagating the 502 error as a build failure.

evidence.quote: ##[error]buildx bake failed with: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: This is the top-level CI step failure message, confirming that the bake job failed due to this network error.

evidence.quote: fetch failed" digest="sha256:0288b5a0d7e71a2cdbdf114cb9869ce2bc4b05adfd6aa5e3ee9fa4b3847e7b80" error="failed to do request: Get "https://cdn01.quay.io/quayio-production-s3/...": context canceled
evidence.reason: Additional fetch failures from quay.io with context cancellation further support a broader transient network instability during the run.

suggested_fix: Re-run the CI job, as this is a transient HTTP 502 network error from GitHub. If failures recur, consider adding retry logic around the wget command (e.g., `wget --tries=3 --waitretry=5`) in the Dockerfile step that downloads the Nydus release tarball.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
